string.text: Meet with Sidorovich
Sidorovich is a key figure for Stalkers in the Zone.
Meet with Dushman
Dushman is a key figure for Mercenaries in the Zone.
Meet with Major Hernandez
Major Hernandez is a key figure for ISG in the Zone.
Stash
Mark for the stash from the drone.
Stash
Mark for the stash from the drone.
Stash
Mark for the stash from the drone.
Undergrounds of the Research Institute "Agroprom"
You need to investigate the undergrounds of the Research Institute "Agroprom". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-8
You need to investigate Laboratory X-8. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-2
You need to investigate Laboratory X-2. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-3
You need to investigate Laboratory X-3. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-6
You need to investigate Laboratory X-6. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Undergrounds of the "Hospital"
You need to investigate the undergrounds of the "Hospital". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Bunker A-1
You need to investigate Bunker A-1. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Undergrounds of "Okrestnosti"
You need to investigate the undergrounds of "Okrestnosti". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Undergrounds of the "Scientific Station"
You need to investigate the undergrounds of the "Scientific Station". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Collider
You need to investigate the Collider. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory in Kasjany
You need to investigate the Laboratory in Kasjany. There may still be some interesting documents there.
Undergrounds of "Anomalous Fields"
You need to investigate the Undergrounds of "Anomalous Fields". There may still be some interesting documents there.

You need to investigate the Undergrounds of "Quiet Hills". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Undergrounds of "Uncharted Lands"
You need to investigate the Undergrounds of "Uncharted Lands". There may still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-27
You need to investigate Laboratory X-27. There may still be some interesting documents there. (5-documents).
